biological_replicate: patients with wild-type p53-expressing prostate cancer
technical_replicate: 10,038 and 14,739 m6A peaks overlapped in two replicates in mock and FTO-IT1 KO cells.
experimental_design: we performed transcriptomic analysis in control and ENZ-resistant C4–2 cell lines.
factor_value: wild-type p53-expressing prostate cancer and ENZ-resistant C4–2 cell lines
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
